message:
test(web): add SectionDataProvider tests

Tests the context provider for section metadata:
- Initial loading state
- Fetch from correct endpoint
- Data transformation (string keys to numbers)
- Error handling (network errors, non-ok responses)
- No refetch optimization
- Default values outside provider
